case_title: TRININTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS JOHNSON, MART BAILEY MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $626.67 FILED BY TRININTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MART BAILEY MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRININTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MART BAILEY MR. $626.67 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $671.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
